## Structure

TCP HandshakeC — server's third handshake step. Fixed 3-byte
body `80 03 68`. All 71 retail observations are byte-identical.

```
[0..1]   80 03                  TCP opcode (constant)
[2]      0x68                   handshake-C constant ('h' ASCII)
```

## Variants

Single 3-byte form. Pure constant.

## Observed contexts

Server-to-client TCP handshake step C — emitted after
HandshakeA (`80 01 66`) and the client's HandshakeB request.
Part of the TCP auth flow before the full session begins.

Same 3-byte form used in patch + info servers.

## Open questions

- Why specifically `0x68`? Like HandshakeA's `0x66`, presumably
  a hardcoded NC2 protocol-version constant.

## Server-side handler

`server.gameserver.packets.server_tcp.HandshakeC` — emits the
verified 3-byte body. Companion packets in patch + info
servers (same 3-byte shape).
